concept: Restaurant Game by Nordcurrent UAB:** In this addictive time-management game, players operate various restaurants, preparing and serving diverse meals and desserts to customers within a strict time limit. Gameplay involves tapping ingredients, utilizing kitchen appliances like coffee makers and pizza ovens, and assembling dishes to fulfill customer orders before their patience meters deplete. Success in each of the over 1000 levels is measured by reaching specific earning targets, with faster service yielding higher tips and bonus coins. Progression involves unlocking new restaurant locations, upgrading kitchen appliances for efficiency, and decorating interiors to attract more clients, all funded by earned in-game currency. Monetization typically includes in-app purchases for gems or coin bundles, allowing players to speed up upgrades, unlock new items, or acquire additional lives.
name: Cooking Fever: Restaurant Game
